scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,client,server "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
